checklist.question: Uses bird CLI (not curl/WebFetch/playwright) for all X/Twitter URLs
Selects correct bird subcommand for the task (read/search/home/bookmarks/tweet/reply/etc)
Formats search/timeline results as table with columns: # | author | summary | link | engagement
For write operations (tweet/reply/follow), shows content and waits for user confirmation before executing
Handles errors correctly: no fallback to alternative tools, appropriate retry logic for rate limits/timeouts
Uses correct flags (--json, -n, --plain, --media) as appropriate for the context
